artifact.title: Paywall Experiment (PS-EXP-001)
artifact.summary: 14-day experiment removing free tier to test conversion impact

sections.heading: Overview
sections.body:
**Experiment ID:** PS-EXP-001
**Status:** Running
**Duration:** Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026 (14 days)

## Hypothesis

Removing the free tier will increase conversion to paid plans.

sections.heading: Day 1: Feb 17
sections.body:
Metric,Value
Signups,12
Paid conversions,2
Conversion rate,16.7%

sections.heading: Day 2: Feb 18
sections.body:
Metric,Value
Signups,15
Paid conversions,3
Conversion rate,20.0%

experiment.hypothesis: Removing free tier increases paid conversion
